LanguageData.GS_Veilhorn.label: Veilhorns
LanguageData.GS_Veilhorn.description: Carriers of this gene grow a set of large horns on top of their head.
LanguageData.GS_Nimble.label: Nimble
LanguageData.GS_Nimble.description: Carriers of this gene hae remarkable kinesthetic intelligence. Tey seem to dance around danger with preternatural grace.
LanguageData.GS_Mute.label: Mute
LanguageData.GS_Mute.description: Carrier of this gene are unable to speak.
LanguageData.GS_Melee_Affinity.label: Melee Affinity
LanguageData.GS_Melee_Affinity.description: Carriers of this gene possess a natural affinity for melee.
LanguageData.GS_Warrior.label: warrior
LanguageData.GS_Warrior.description: Carriers of these genes are genetic warriors. They can’t stand the thought of being beaten by someone else in a fight.
LanguageData.GS_Skullplate_Head.label: Skullplate head
LanguageData.GS_Skullplate_Head.description: Carriers of this gene have a skull facial structure.
LanguageData.GS_EMP_Weakness.label: emp weakness
LanguageData.GS_EMP_Weakness.description: Carriers of this gene are vulnerable to emp effects.
LanguageData.GS_Electroreception.label: Electroreception
LanguageData.GS_Electroreception.description: The electrochemistry of this gene's carrier hangs in a delicate balance. Any exposure to EMP will upset that balance, causing the carrier to suffer from brain shock.
LanguageData.GS_Cloak_Glands.label: cloak glands
LanguageData.GS_Cloak_Glands.description: Carriers of this gene have skin pigments that refract light, letting them blend with their surroundings and become invisible for a short time. In smoke, particulate-reactive cells increase this effect to near-total concealment.
